creator: hp@tmm.cx
text:
I have since build CURRENT for the CM4, and that boots after some help on #freebsd-dev on irc.

I managed to get a slightly more useful dump out of it now, I also uploaded the cores and kernel.debug here: https://cloud.tmm.cx/s/HxPeQw28g7N74RR
